pages.text: Everything in biomancy past the harvest begins with one ominous lump of flesh: the $(flesh)Primordial Core$(). It is the seed of the Cradle, and you can make one the day you have a furnace and a few cuts of meat.
pages.title: The Primordial Core

pages.text: Raw meat at the four corners, a $(italic)bone$() on each side, and an $(italic)ender pearl$() at the heart. No biomancy parts required — this is the one recipe that bootstraps the whole craft.

$(bold)Looking at it makes you uneasy$() — the tooltip is not joking. The Core does two things: it is the heart of the $(l:2_cradle/building_cradle)Primordial Cradle$(), and it is itself the single strongest $(italic)anomaly$() tribute the Cradle can be fed. Make at least two: one to build with, one to feed.
pages.title: Two Uses
